title: Dark Web Informer
description: Dark Web Informer is a threat intelligence service that monitors dark web forums, ransomware leak sites, and cybercrime channels, publishing alerts on data leaks, breaches, and threat-actor activity. This connector ingests Dark Web Informer threat-feed alerts, indicators of compromise, and ransomware victim intelligence into OpenCTI through the Dark Web Informer API, with scheduled incremental imports.
short_description: Ingests Dark Web Informer threat-feed alerts, IOCs, and ransomware victim intelligence into OpenCTI.
